zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Cawarden於大約1270年出生在英國爾可盧頓時，她的父親John Le Leche21歲，母親Mrs John Le Leche20歲。她於1293年之前與John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Cawarden于大约1270年出生在英国爾可盧頓时，她的父亲John Le Leche21岁，母亲Mrs John Le Leche20岁。她于1293年之前与John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Cawarden was born about 1270, in Clutton, Cheshire, England, her father, John Le Leche, was 21 and her mother, Mrs John Le Leche, was 20. She married John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk before 1293. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Cawarden est née environ 1270, à Clutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Le Leche, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Le Leche, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk avant 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Cawarden um 1270 in Clutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Le Leche 21 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Le Leche 20. Sie hat vor 1293 John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Cawarden è nata il circa 1270 nel Clutton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Le Leche, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mrs John Le Leche, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk prima del 1293. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Cawardenが約1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアクルットオンで生まれた時，父John Le Lecheは21歳，母Mrs John Le Lecheは20歳であった。1293年以前にJohn le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Cawarden(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 체실르 클루턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Le Leche(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Le Leche(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1293년 이전 John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Chatsworth House, Bakewell, Derbyshire,: Chatsworth, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Cawarden nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Clutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Le Leche, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Le Leche, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk antes 1293. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Cawarden родилась около 1270 г. в местности клуттон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Le Leche было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Le Leche, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk перед 1293 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Cawarden nació aproximadamente 1270, en Clutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Le Leche, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs John Le Leche, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John le Leche Esq. of Eggemere And Wrighton, Norfolk antes de 1293. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas.
